case_title: NEW SAN FRANCISCO LAUNDRY DBA: PEERLESS/CALOU'S VS NETO VALMAR DBA BAHIA BRAZILIAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $790.19 FILED BY NEW SAN FRANCISCO LAUNDRY DBA: PEERLESS/CALOU'S LINEN SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NETO VALMAR DBA BAHIA BRAZILIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NETO VALMAR DBA BAHIA BRAZILIAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEW SAN FRANCISCO LAUNDRY DBA: PEERLESS/CALOU'S LINEN SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NETO VALMAR DBA BAHIA BRAZILIAN $257.97 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $265.97, TO BE PAID BY 3/18/92 BY THE CLOSE OF THE BUSINESS DAY AT 41 FRANKLIN ST IN S F STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NETO VALMAR DBA BAHIA BRAZILIAN
